COURSE CREATOR PACK
===================
Setup time: ~3 minutes. After that, double-click any agent and go.

FASTEST START
-------------
Want the launch email flow only? Double-click:
  Launch Email Sequencer.exe

No Python install is needed for that executable. It still needs your free
OpenRouter key saved at C:\Users\YOU\Desktop\openrouter-api.txt or in the
OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment variable.

QUICK START
-----------
1. Install Python 3.11+ (python.org/downloads, check "Add to PATH")
2. Get a free OpenRouter key at openrouter.ai/keys (no credit card)
3. Save your key to C:\Users\YOU\Desktop\openrouter-api.txt
   OR set the OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment variable
4. Double-click setup.bat (one-time, creates the working environment)
5. Double-click any run_*.bat to launch that agent

THE 7 AGENTS
------------
run_launch_email_sequencer.bat   Product launch sequence, 6 emails + follow-up
run_sales_page_critique.bat      Paste your sales page, get specific rewrites
run_refund_deescalator.bat       Handle refund requests tactfully
run_customer_qa.bat               Answer pre-purchase questions honestly
run_affiliate_outreach.bat        Personalized affiliate pitch + follow-up
run_testimonial_collector.bat     Ask for testimonials at the right moment
run_lesson_outliner.bat           Structured lesson outline, hook to close

SMOKE TEST
----------
Run the smoke test to verify everything is connected and working:
  venv\Scripts\python.exe smoke_test.py
This hits your OpenRouter key 7 times. Uses ~7 of your 200 daily free requests.

COST
----
$0/month as long as you stay on OpenRouter's free tier. The shared/client.py
has a fallback chain of 7 free models. If you outgrow the free tier, change
one line in shared/client.py to a paid model.

LICENSE
-------
Commercial use permitted in your own course/info-product business. Do not resell.
Full terms: LICENSE.md

PROBLEMS?
---------
Check your OpenRouter key is saved correctly. The key loader looks for:
  1. C:\Users\<you>\Desktop\openrouter-api.txt
  2. .env file in the same folder as the bat files
  3. OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var

Run setup.bat again if anything breaks after a system update.
